gates.name: git_local_remote_alignment
gates.detail: The deployed source commit was pushed before image build; final local and remote branch alignment is verified after release-evidence publication.

gates.name: github_pull_request_checks
gates.detail: Backend API, Bicep, frontend, Python, Windows collector, and frontend/bridge/runtime Docker smoke checks passed; draft PR merge state is clean.

gates.name: local_automated_tests
gates.detail: Python 30, backend 62, frontend 20, and Windows collector 5 tests passed.

gates.name: frontend_production_build
gates.detail: Vite build passed; chunk-size warning remains an optimization advisory.

gates.name: dependency_audit
gates.detail: Backend has zero reported vulnerabilities; frontend has one low-severity dev-server-only esbuild advisory and no high or critical findings.

gates.name: bicep_validation
gates.detail: Bicep build passed with an update advisory.

gates.name: full_bicep_apply
gates.reason: The current template would risk topology and storage drift; targeted Container App updates were used instead.

gates.name: acr_immutable_images
gates.detail: Every exact ACR tag digest matches its local Docker RepoDigest.

gates.name: azure_targeted_rollout
gates.detail: All apps are Single revision mode, Succeeded, Running, Healthy, Provisioned, latest-ready aligned, and at 100 percent latest-revision traffic.

gates.name: azure_release_metadata_readback
gates.detail: All six apps report the exact image tag, full commit, product baseline, renderer commit, and report-context version.

gates.name: public_http_smoke
gates.detail: UI and API health/readiness return 200; readiness confirms PostgreSQL, auth, and tenant requirements; protected route returns 401 without authentication.

gates.name: live_browser_signed_out_responsive_shell
gates.detail: Production stylesheet index-D5y4kGcT.css verified at 1280x720 and 390x844 with no horizontal overflow or browser warnings/errors.

gates.name: signed_in_six_area_uat
gates.reason: The in-app browser had no authenticated PatchForge session; no account login was performed.

gates.name: fresh_signed_pack_and_report_exports
gates.reason: No fresh signed pack or Customer, Board, and CAB DOCX/PDF proof is claimed for this baseline.

gates.name: production_validation_data_cleanup
gates.reason: No signed-in production validation records were created during this rollout.

remaining_notes: Signed-in six-area UAT and fresh signed report proof remain explicit human gates.
The Bicep desired-state model must be reconciled with the live PostgreSQL topology before a full template apply is safe.
The draft pull request is clean but remains unmerged.
